title: skibidi123skibidi.177.777
description: A silly mod I made that adds skibidi toilet, tv head, and more.
body:
# Skibidi123skibidi.177.777

[![Discord](https://img.shields.io/discord/1247254072696897596?label=join%20our%20discord&logo=discord&style=for-the-badge)](https://discord.gg/H5zwhruW8q)

So me and my homie were talking about Modrinth revenue splits, and he said slop projects with names like "skibidi123skibidi.177.777" shouldn't be making 100% revenue.
Naturally, I remembered that name and made it into a mod.

# What This Mod Adds
The Skibidi Toilet (ofc)

The TV Man

The "glorious" Skibidi Dimension

Some mysterious Brain Juice Fluid™

Yeah don’t expect good content here — I made this as a troll mod just to mess with my friend lmao.

# 🧪 Alpha State
This mod is in alpha, so it's buggy, weird and might not get updated.
